title: FMT1 modifier bit stripping in verify() is correct and well-documented
description: key.rs lines 228-240: the TPM2 FMT1 modifier bit stripping logic (mask 0x0F40, discriminant: bit 7 set AND bits 15:12 clear) is correct per TCG TPM2 Part 2 §6.6.3. The inline comment explicitly rejects the simpler 'bit 8 clear' discriminant and explains why (subject number 1 sets bit 8, making 0x1DB bypass stripping). This is exactly the kind of non-obvious correct code that should be defended against simplification.
